title: Ship design system v3.0 — new color tokens
description: v3 introduces a completely new color token naming convention. All teams using the design system will need to update. This is a breaking change. Horizon has already diverged locally and will be most impacted.

title: Update DataTable with new row hover state
description: Row hover now uses a subtle blue tint instead of gray. Published to library 2026-05-27. Atlas and Horizon both consume DataTable — their Figma files need to be resynced.

title: Establish design review process for cross-team components
description: Three teams have now built their own notification bell. Need a formal process so teams propose to Nova before building custom components.
